mapper.insert: insert into plan(title, users_no, `desc`, expense, start_date, end_date, share) values(#{title}, #{usersNo}, #{desc}, #{expense}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{share})

insert into plandetail(place_no, seq, plan_id, place_url, place_name, place_address) values
(#{item.placeNo}, #{item.seq}, #{item.planId}, #{item.placeUrl}, #{item.placeName}, #{item.placeAddress})
mapper.select: select p.id, p.title, p.users_no, p.`desc`, p.expense, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.share, u.name as user_name from plan p join users u on u.no = p.users_no where p.id = #{no}
select place_no, seq, plan_id, place_url, place_name, place_address from plandetail where plan_id = #{planId} order by seq
select p.id, p.title, p.users_no, p.`desc`, p.expense, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.share, u.name as user_name from plan p join users u on u.no = p.users_no order by p.id
